summary: Implemented US-011: Generate base cathedral geometry. Created buildCathedralGeometry.ts (pure geometry builder producing a Group with base platform, nave, and two towers driven by height/symmetry params), sceneParamsChanged.ts (shallow equality guard), and rebuildCathedral.ts (dispose-and-replace cycle). Extended RendererHandle with update(params) method using dirty-flag guard to prevent per-frame rebuilds. Replaced placeholder mesh rotation with slow Y-axis cathedral group rotation. Wired renderer.update() into main.ts for immediate cathedral visibility on load and on aggregator/preset changes. Marked createPlaceholderMesh as @deprecated. Updated barrel exports. Fixed test mocks across 4 test files for TypeScript strict mode compliance. All 329 unit tests pass, all 48 e2e tests pass, lint and typecheck clean.
